Equatorial Guinea Motor Vehicle Third-Party Premium — What You Need to Know

Check mandatory motor third-party insurance costs in Equatorial Guinea. Legal requirements, minimum premiums, and what's covered under third-party liability. Use this free calculator to get a quick estimate before contacting insurance providers.

Equatorial Guinea follows CIMA Code. Oil economy drives demand for commercial insurance. The market is regulated by CIMA, with insurance penetration at 0.4% of GDP.

Disclaimer: These are estimates based on market data and published rates. Actual premiums depend on individual circumstances, insurer assessment, and negotiation. Always get formal quotes from licensed providers.
